'''鈭歫-dh-p-dh''' ('''kajadhpedhoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yeeld|yeeld]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-dh-p-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yeeld|yeeld]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歫-dh-p-dh
|-
! Lemma
| kajadhpedhoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thijadhpedhoko|thijadhpedhoko]] || [[word:jijadhpedhoko|jijadhpedhoko]] || [[word:shijadhpedhoko|shijadhpedhoko]] || [[word:kijadhpedhoko|kijadhpedhoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthujadhpedhoko|thuthujadhpedhoko]] || [[word:jujujadhpedhoko|jujujadhpedhoko]] || [[word:shushujadhpedhoko|shushujadhpedhoko]] || [[word:kukujadhpedhoko|kukujadhpedhoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thujadhpedhoko|thujadhpedhoko]] || [[word:jujadhpedhoko|jujadhpedhoko]] || [[word:shujadhpedhoko|shujadhpedhoko]] || [[word:kujadhpedhoko|kujadhpedhoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thujadhpedhoko|thujadhpedhoko]] || [[word:jujadhpedhoko|jujadhpedhoko]] || [[word:shujadhpedhoko|shujadhpedhoko]] || [[word:kujadhpedhoko|kujadhpedhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thejadhpedhoko|thejadhpedhoko]] || [[word:jejadhpedhoko|jejadhpedhoko]] || [[word:shejadhpedhoko|shejadhpedhoko]] || [[word:kejadhpedhoko|kejadhpedhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothojadhpedhoko|thothojadhpedhoko]] || [[word:jojojadhpedhoko|jojojadhpedhoko]] || [[word:shoshojadhpedhoko|shoshojadhpedhoko]] || [[word:kokojadhpedhoko|kokojadhpedhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thojadhpedhoko|thojadhpedhoko]] || [[word:jojadhpedhoko|jojadhpedhoko]] || [[word:shojadhpedhoko|shojadhpedhoko]] || [[word:kojadhpedhoko|kojadhpedhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thojadhpedhoko|thojadhpedhoko]] || [[word:jojadhpedhoko|jojadhpedhoko]] || [[word:shojadhpedhoko|shojadhpedhoko]] || [[word:kojadhpedhoko|kojadhpedhoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙jadhpedhoko|th忙jadhpedhoko]] || [[word:j忙jadhpedhoko|j忙jadhpedhoko]] || [[word:sh忙jadhpedhoko|sh忙jadhpedhoko]] || [[word:k忙jadhpedhoko|k忙jadhpedhoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathajadhpedhoko|thathajadhpedhoko]] || [[word:jajajadhpedhoko|jajajadhpedhoko]] || [[word:shashajadhpedhoko|shashajadhpedhoko]] || [[word:kakajadhpedhoko|kakajadhpedhoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thajadhpedhoko|thajadhpedhoko]] || [[word:jajadhpedhoko|jajadhpedhoko]] || [[word:shajadhpedhoko|shajadhpedhoko]] || [[word:kajadhpedhoko|kajadhpedhoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thajadhpedhoko|thajadhpedhoko]] || [[word:jajadhpedhoko|jajadhpedhoko]] || [[word:shajadhpedhoko|shajadhpedhoko]] || [[word:kajadhpedhoko|kajadhpedhoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shajadhpedhithi|shajadhpedhithi]] || [[word:shajadhpedhiji|shajadhpedhiji]] || [[word:shajadhpedhishi|shajadhpedhishi]] || [[word:shajadhpedhiki|shajadhpedhiki]]
